Package org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.mariadb

@NullMarked package org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.mariadb
Provides the API for embedding observations.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.springframework.ai.vectorstore
    Provides interfaces and implementations for working with vector databases in Spring AI.
    org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.mariadb.autoconfigure
     
  • Class
    Description
    MariaDBFilterExpressionConverter
    Converts Filter.Expression into MariaDB SQL WHERE clause format using JSON_VALUE functions for metadata filtering.
    MariaDBSchemaValidator
     
    MariaDBVectorStore
    MariaDB-based vector store implementation using MariaDB's vector search capabilities.
    MariaDBVectorStore.MariaDBBuilder
    Builder for creating instances of MariaDBVectorStore.
    MariaDBVectorStore.MariaDBDistanceType
     
    MariaDBVectorStore.MariaDBDocument
    The representation of Document along with its embedding.
